utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 items appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with all details per the format (each requires the coverage type with costs): - health_coverage: includes physical and mental health insurance with costs. The plan lists a description and a cost (€165/month). It does not explicitly state mental health coverage details, but the description says 'physical and mental health coverage.' Cost is provided. This satisfies the format at a basic level. - property_coverage: home/contents insurance with costs. The plan specifies 'home contents and professional equipment up to €5,000' and a cost (€90/month). That fits the format. - travel_coverage: travel insurance with costs. The plan provides a description (international travel, medical limits up to €50,000, concierge) and a cost (€50/month). That fits. - additional_services: any enhancement services with costs. The plan provides 'Instructor Liability Plan' with coverage limit and cost (€45/month). That fits. - total_budget: complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. The plan provides a total monthly cost (€350/month) but does not include an annual breakdown. The format asks for 'complete monthly/annual cost breakdown.' Since only monthly is provided, this is not fully specified. Therefore, 4 of 5 items are fully specified according to the required details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists: LifeFirst Standard Package for health (maps to LifeFirst Standard Plan under primary_health_coverage.physical_health), PrimeHome Premium Coverage for property (maps to PrimeHome Premium Coverage under property_protection.home_content), LifeFirst Standard Plan for travel (maps to LifeFirst Standard Plan under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance), and Instructor Liability Plan (not present in ground-truth; no rating available). Only items that exist in the ground-truth can be mapped to ratings.
